vocab.meaning: có lợi/tạo điều kiện cho việc làm việc sâu (tập trung cao độ)
vocab.example: I gravitate towards the university archives because the atmosphere is highly conducive to deep work.

vocab.meaning: một địa điểm hẻo lánh, tách biệt
vocab.example: I have found a sequestered spot in the local park where I can read without being disturbed by passersby.
Some people need silence, but I actually prefer a coffee shop with moderate ambient background noise to stay alert.

vocab.meaning: trạm làm việc được thiết kế chuẩn công thái học
vocab.example: I've invested heavily in an ergonomic workstation at home to prevent back strain during long study sessions.

vocab.meaning: môi trường cực kỳ tối giản và sạch sẽ (không gây xao nhãng)
vocab.example: I find it hard to focus in messy rooms, so I prefer the sterilized environment of a modern study hall.
When I feel my motivation waning, I head to a communal study area to draw energy from other students' productivity.
To achieve optimum concentration, I usually head to the library's top floor where phone usage is strictly prohibited.
I occasionally study in art galleries or creative hubs, hoping the surroundings will trigger sparks of inspiration.

vocab.meaning: hoàn toàn không có các yếu tố gây xao nhãng
vocab.example: The attic is my go-to place because it is completely devoid of distractions like the TV or the fridge.

vocab.meaning: không gian thông thoáng/gió lưu thông tốt
vocab.example: A cramped room makes me drowsy, so I always look for a well-ventilated space with plenty of fresh air.
